homepage.heroHeadline: Trusted Garage Door Experts in Las Vegas
homepage.heroSubline: Keeping your garage doors running smoothly in the desert heat. Family-owned and serving Henderson, North Las Vegas, and Summerlin since 2012.
aboutText: Horizon Garage Door was founded in 2012 when our family saw how quickly the intense Las Vegas sun and dust storms damaged garage doors. What started as a small repair service has grown into a trusted local business serving thousands of homes across the valley.

We take pride in treating every home like our own. Our technicians are background-checked, uniformed professionals who arrive on time and leave no mess behind. We use only high-quality parts designed to withstand our extreme climate.

As active members of the Las Vegas community, we're committed to fair pricing and honest advice. Whether you're in an older home near Downtown or a new build in Summerlin, we know garage doors in Southern Nevada.

valueProps.title: Climate-Proof Solutions
valueProps.description: We use materials specifically chosen to resist warping and fading in 115°F desert heat.

valueProps.title: Same-Day Service
valueProps.description: Most repairs completed within 24 hours because we know a stuck garage door can't wait.

valueProps.title: Local Knowledge
valueProps.description: 12 years experience with Las Vegas's unique housing styles and weather challenges.

valueProps.title: Transparent Pricing
valueProps.description: No hidden fees - you'll know the exact cost before we start any work.

homepage.ctaSubline: Call 555-GAR-R90 for fast, friendly service from Las Vegas natives who understand your home.

services.name: Garage Door Repair
services.shortDescription: Fast fixes for broken springs, off-track doors, and opener issues in the Las Vegas heat.
services.description:
When your garage door won't budge in the middle of a 110°F day, you need help fast. Our technicians diagnose and repair all common issues, from snapped torsion springs (which fail more often in extreme temperatures) to misaligned tracks caused by our shifting desert soil.

We specialize in repairs for older homes around Downtown where original garage doors are showing their age, as well as newer systems in master-planned communities. Every repair includes a full inspection of rollers, cables, and hardware to catch small problems before they leave you stranded.

Using heavy-duty replacement parts rated for high temperatures, we ensure your repair lasts through dust storms and summer heat waves. Most repairs are completed the same day with a 90-day warranty on all work.
process: Step 1: Detailed inspection of door movement, springs, tracks, and opener
Step 2: Explanation of needed repairs with upfront pricing
Step 3: Replacement of worn parts with climate-resistant components
Step 4: Full system testing and safety check before leaving
benefits: Same-day service for urgent repairs
Technicians trained on all major brands
Parts designed for desert conditions
No extra charge for after-hours emergencies

faq.question: Why did my garage door spring break?
faq.answer: The extreme temperature swings in Las Vegas cause metal fatigue faster than in milder climates. Most torsion springs last 5-7 years here versus 10+ years elsewhere.

faq.question: How quickly can you fix a stuck door?
faq.answer: We typically respond within 4 hours for emergency repairs. Most spring replacements take under 90 minutes once we arrive.

faq.question: Do you work on older homes with original doors?
faq.answer: Absolutely. We're experts at maintaining mid-century systems common in Las Vegas's historic neighborhoods, often keeping original doors operational with proper adjustments.

services.name: Garage Door Installation
services.shortDescription: Professional installation of energy-efficient garage doors built for Nevada's climate.
services.description:
New construction in Summerlin or replacing an outdated door in Henderson? We install high-performance garage doors that stand up to desert conditions while enhancing your home's curb appeal. Our selection includes insulated steel doors that help regulate garage temperatures (critical when it's 115°F outside) and durable aluminum options resistant to UV fading.

For historic homes near Fremont Street, we offer custom wood-look doors that maintain neighborhood charm while providing modern durability. In master-planned communities, we coordinate with HOA requirements for style and color matching.

Every installation includes professional disposal of your old door, precision alignment to prevent future issues, and a tutorial on maintaining your investment. We handle all permitting requirements for North Las Vegas's newer developments where inspections are mandatory.
process: Step 1: Free consultation to discuss insulation needs, style preferences, and budget
Step 2: Precise measurements accounting for our region's soil movement
Step 3: Professional removal and disposal of old door
Step 4: Installation with reinforced framing for wind resistance
benefits: Energy-efficient options reduce garage heat buildup
Professional measurement prevents future alignment issues
Styles to match any Las Vegas architecture
Full cleanup including old door removal

faq.question: How long does a new garage door last in Las Vegas?
faq.answer: With proper maintenance, our installed doors average 15-20 years even in harsh conditions. We use thicker gauge steel and premium finishes specifically for desert climates.

faq.question: Do you work with HOAs in Summerlin?
faq.answer: Yes, we're familiar with all major community guidelines and can provide pre-approval documentation for your architectural review committee.

faq.question: Will a new garage door improve my home's energy efficiency?
faq.answer: Absolutely. Our insulated doors can reduce garage temperatures by 20-30°F, which matters when your garage shares walls with living spaces in single-story Las Vegas homes.

services.name: Preventive Maintenance
services.shortDescription: Annual tune-ups to extend your garage door's life in harsh desert conditions.
services.description:
The combination of dust storms, extreme heat, and UV exposure in Las Vegas accelerates wear on garage door systems. Our comprehensive maintenance program catches small issues before they become expensive repairs.

During each visit, we lubricate all moving parts with high-temperature grease (standard lubricants dry out quickly here), inspect springs for metal fatigue, and check safety sensors that can be affected by our intense sunlight. For homes near Red Rock Canyon where windblown sand is constant, we perform additional track cleaning and roller inspections.

Clients on our annual plan receive priority scheduling and discounts on parts. We provide detailed reports with photos showing component conditions, helping budget for future replacements. Many older homes in the Southwest valley have saved thousands by addressing wear early through our maintenance program.
process: Step 1: Full system inspection with digital documentation
Step 2: Cleaning of tracks and rollers to remove abrasive desert sand
Step 3: Application of desert-grade lubricants to all moving parts
Step 4: Safety system testing and performance optimization
benefits: Reduces emergency repair costs by 60% on average
Specialized lubricants last 3x longer in heat
Priority service for maintenance customers
Digital records to track component wear

faq.question: How often should maintenance be done in Las Vegas?
faq.answer: We recommend biannual service - before summer heat peaks and after monsoon season when dust accumulates. Homes near construction zones may need quarterly visits.

faq.question: Can maintenance prevent spring failures?
faq.answer: While all springs eventually fatigue, our inspections identify early warning signs like rust pitting or coil gaps, allowing planned replacement before sudden breaks occur.

faq.question: Do you service older chain-drive openers?
faq.answer: Yes, we specialize in maintaining all opener types common in Las Vegas homes, including vintage systems in original mid-century properties.

services.name: Opener Installation
services.shortDescription: Quiet, reliable opener systems with battery backups for Las Vegas power fluctuations.
services.description:
From new builds in Inspirada to retrofit projects in historic neighborhoods, we install garage door openers designed for Las Vegas living. Our preferred belt-drive models operate at whisper volume (important when bedrooms sit above garages in many local floor plans) and include battery backups for our frequent power blips during summer storms.

We program all safety features to account for our intense sunlight that can interfere with sensors, and reinforce mounting hardware to prevent vibration in windy conditions. For luxury homes with smart systems, we integrate openers with popular home automation platforms while ensuring reliable operation when Wi-Fi is spotty.

Every installation includes personalized training on features like vacation lock modes (valuable for Snowbirds) and timer-to-close functions that provide peace of mind when you're away from your Henderson home for extended periods.
process: Step 1: Assessment of garage structure and electrical access points
Step 2: Recommendation of opener type based on door weight and usage
Step 3: Professional mounting with seismic reinforcement
Step 4: Thorough testing of safety sensors in bright sunlight conditions
benefits: Battery backup maintains access during outages
Ultra-quiet operation for attached garages
Smart home integration options
Reinforced mounting for wind resistance

faq.question: Why choose belt drive over chain drive in Las Vegas?
faq.answer: Belt drives require less maintenance in dusty conditions and won't dry out like chain lubricants in extreme heat. They're also significantly quieter - important in homes where garages share walls with living spaces.

faq.question: Can you replace my opener without changing the existing door?
faq.answer: Yes, we adapt new openers to work with nearly any door system, including older panels common in Las Vegas's original neighborhoods. We'll ensure proper balance first.

faq.question: How long does opener installation take?
faq.answer: Most standard installations are completed in 2-3 hours, including safety testing and customer training on new features.

services.name: 24/7 Emergency Service
services.shortDescription: Round-the-clock help when your garage door won't close in Las Vegas.
services.description:
A malfunctioning garage door isn't just inconvenient in Las Vegas - it's a security risk and can turn your garage into an oven during summer. Our emergency team is available 24/7 to address urgent issues like doors stuck open in monsoon rains or springs that fail during extreme temperature swings.

We keep specially equipped vans stocked with common replacement parts for quick repairs at any hour. Whether you're returning from a late shift on The Strip or discover a problem before an early airport trip, our local technicians typically arrive within 90 minutes.

Emergency service includes temporary securing of compromised doors and follow-up inspections to prevent recurrence. We understand the unique stresses Las Vegas weather places on garage systems - our solutions account for everything from dust storm grit to rapid evening cooldowns that stress metal components.
process: Step 1: Immediate phone assessment to determine safety risks
Step 2: Dispatch of nearest available technician with appropriate parts
Step 3: Secure temporary solution if full repair isn't possible overnight
Step 4: Detailed explanation of emergency repair and recommended follow-up
benefits: Average 90-minute response time valley-wide
Technicians carry most common repair parts
Temporary security solutions when needed
No after-hours price gouging

faq.question: What qualifies as a garage door emergency?
faq.answer: Any situation compromising home security (door stuck open) or safety (door falling unexpectedly). We prioritize these over general repairs.

faq.question: Do you charge more for middle-of-the-night calls?
faq.answer: We have a modest after-hours fee, but our labor rates remain fair. You'll always know costs before we proceed.

faq.question: Can you secure my garage if parts aren't available immediately?
faq.answer: Yes, we carry temporary locking mechanisms and can board up compromised doors until permanent repairs can be made the next business day.

reviews.name: Marta S.
reviews.text: Had a spring snap during last summer's heat wave - Horizon had someone at my Henderson home in under two hours. The technician explained how the 115°F days accelerate wear and showed me warning signs to watch for. So impressed with their knowledge of desert conditions!

reviews.name: James R.
reviews.text: Our new build in Summerlin needed doors that met strict HOA guidelines. Horizon not only found perfect matches but installed them with perfect alignment - no adjustments needed in 18 months despite the soil shifting. Their crew cleaned up so well you'd never know they were here.

reviews.name: Linh T.
reviews.text: Been using Horizon's maintenance plan for three years in my 1980s North Las Vegas home. They caught worn rollers before they damaged the track and always use some special high-temp lubricant that actually lasts between visits. Worth every penny in avoided repairs.

reviews.name: Carlos M.
reviews.text: Garage door wouldn't close after returning from a late shift at the casino. Called at 1:30 AM and Horizon had a tech here by 2:45 who fixed a bent track from a recent dust storm. Didn't try to upsell me, just got it working safely. Lifesaver!

reviews.name: Susan K.
reviews.text: The new belt-drive opener Horizon installed is so quiet I can barely hear it from my bedroom above the garage. They programmed it to close automatically after 5 minutes - perfect for when I forget after unloading groceries in this Vegas heat.

reviews.name: David P.
reviews.text: Original door on our 1972 ranch near Downtown was sticking badly. Instead of pushing a full replacement, Horizon adjusted the tracks and replaced rollers with heavy-duty versions. Saved us thousands and preserved the home's character. True local experts.

Whether you're in Green Valley or Anthem, we ensure your garage door operates smoothly year-round.
